items.title: Boeing Stock: Three Reasons To Keep An Eye On The Chart This Week
items.description: Boeing stock could be set for another down week. FAA fines, new reports lead headlines for the Dow Jones plane maker.

items.title: Lockheed Beats Market in a Month: How to Play the Stock Now?
items.description: LMT stock jumps 7% on strong contracts and backlog, but near-term earnings and high debt raise caution for investors.

items.title: Does Textron’s Recent Boeing EV Tiltrotor Win Signal Room for Further Share Gains?
items.description: If you are wondering what to do with Textron stock right now, you are definitely not alone. The stock recently closed at $81.23 after a slightly bumpy week, down 1.8%, following a strong run of 3.0% over the past month. Year to date, investors have enjoyed a solid 7.2% climb. Even with a broader perspective, Textron has surged 27.1% in the last three years and 129% over five years, despite a dip of nearly 8% in the past twelve months as the market reconsiders risk across the industrials...

items.title: Archer Aviation Joins White House Flying Taxi Program
items.description: Archer Aviation (NYSE: ACHR) to participate in White House's eVTOL pilot program with US airlines and cities for electric air taxis.

items.title: AerCap Delivers First Two Boeing 777-300ERSF Freighters To Kalitta Air, Replacing Aging 747 Fleet
items.description: AerCap Holdings N.V. ("AerCap" or the "Company") (NYSE:AER) today announced it has delivered the first two Boeing 777-300ERSF Passenger-to-Freighter ("P2F") converted aircraft to Kalitta Air, including the prototype
